title: Arrow Bundles
description: Craft an arrow bundle to get 20 arrows from 3 sticks, flint, and feathers. Compatible with Forge, Fabric, Quilt, and as a datapack.
body:
This idea was <s>stolen</s> inspired by Hoplite (hoplite.gg), the FFA Minecraft server.

When you put 3 flint, 3 sticks, and 3 feathers in a crafting grid (like normal arrows, but 3 across}, you get 20 arrows (as opposed to 9)

I cannot guaruntee this will work on 1.21. (Fix coming soon!)

Enjoy!

-quantumsoldship
